# Support Guide

## Where to get help
- **General usage questions, examples, discussions**: Use GitHub Discussions
  https://github.com/FishgameStudio/termgif/discussions
- **Bug reports & reproducible issues**: Open a GitHub Issue (use the bug report template)
  https://github.com/FishgameStudio/termgif/issues
- **Security vulnerabilities**: Do NOT create public issues! Report via GitHub private security advisories
  https://github.com/FishgameStudio/termgif/security/advisories/new

## Supported Versions
Only the latest minor release receives bug fixes and updates.
- ✅ Latest version: full support
- ❌ Older versions: no official support or patches
- This project is currently in early development (v0.x), APIs may break between minor versions

## Environment
- Primary support: Windows
- macOS / Linux: not yet officially supported (roadmap item)
- Python: >= 3.10

## Troubleshooting Tips
1. Confirm dependencies are installed: `pip install pyte pillow pywinpty`
2. Check font file paths and ensure monospace fonts exist on your system
3. Verify terminal commands run correctly directly in Windows Command Prompt/PowerShell first
4. Update to the latest version
5. Attach full error logs, OS info and reproduction steps when opening a bug report

## Community Guidelines
- Be polite and respectful
- Keep discussions focused on termgif usage, bugs and feature requests
- Follow the Code of Conduct
